name: sovereign-github-stats-mcp
description: MCP server for GitHub repository statistics — stars, forks, issues, PRs, languages, contributors, commit activity. No auth needed for public repos.

tools.name: repo_stats
tools.description: Get repository stats — stars, forks, open issues, watchers, size, license, topics.

tools.name: contributor_stats
tools.description: Get top contributors for a repository.

tools.name: release_info
tools.description: Get latest releases with download counts for a repository.

tools.name: language_breakdown
tools.description: Get language breakdown (bytes and percentages) for a repository.

tools.name: commit_activity
tools.description: Get weekly commit activity for the last year.

tools.name: compare_repos
tools.description: Compare two GitHub repositories side by side.
